World Foundation raises $52.5 million in WLD token sale with one-year lockup
news.summary: The "first close" of the WLD token sale was led by Pantera and included Bain Capital Crypto, Eightco Holdings, Selini, Susquehanna other investors.

news.title: World Foundation Raises $52.5M to Scale Sam Altman’s ‘Proof of Human’ ID
news.summary: Pantera Capital led the one-year locked token sale, joined by Bain Capital Crypto, as World scales its ID network for AI agents.

news.title: EU Names Justin Sun's HTX in Russia Sanctions, Two Months After UK
news.summary: The 21st package stops short of a full asset freeze for HTX, which it accused of "significantly frustrating" its Russia measures.

news.title: Bitcoin falls under $64K as surging US bond yields boost Fed rate-hike odds
news.summary: Bitcoin saw several dips under the $64,000 mark as a Binance “plunge protection team” reemerged with bid liquidity to avoid a deeper BTC price rout.

news.title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
news.summary: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.
